text.title: Writing Design Documents Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Writing Design Documents.

example.scenario: Feature 'PDF digest export'. AD-1 = 'use wkhtmltopdf vs weasyprint' (chose weasyprint for license + perf), traced to FR-2. API contract POST /exports with example bodies + 400/422 error matrix.
